title: geranium tanii
intro: Geranium tanii, also known as the Tanii geranium or Pelargonium tanii, is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae. It is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Geranium tanii include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and providing relief from menstrual cramps and digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Geranium tanii include teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used to support overall well-being and promote a healthy balance of body and mind.
